summary: Completed comprehensive testing of dynamic points system for GuessIt football prediction platform. All core features working correctly including API endpoints, formula calculations, frontend display, admin panel integration, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Football matches API returns 200 OK with match data
Dynamic points structure contains all required fields (home, draw, away, labels, base_points)
Dynamic points range validation [5, 50] for all options
Dynamic points formula calculation: base_points * (1 - pct/100) * 1.3, clamped [5, 50]
Equal distribution fallback (0 votes = 43 pts each, Balanced label)
Admin panel 'Base Points (Dynamic)' field renamed correctly
Admin panel base points update and verification
Frontend homepage dynamic points display under prediction bars
Frontend risk labels display (Popular Pick, High Risk, Balanced)
Quick Predict modal dynamic points and labels display
Mobile responsiveness (390px) - dynamic points and labels visible
User prediction selection and visual feedback
Admin panel points settings update functionality
